utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all of these. Each is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) given; travel_dates (July 1–5, 2024) specified; transportation includes flight details, route, class, passengers, and cost (€350); accommodation includes hotel name, nights, rate per night, total cost, and amenities (€500 total); activities list multiple entries with names and costs; additional_services includes meals with cost estimate (€550) and restaurants; total_budget is given (€1,720) with a clear breakdown. Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered and fully detailed.
